# ctrlplane_variable_set (Resource)

Manages a variable set in Ctrlplane. Variable sets allow you to define groups of variables that are applied to release targets matching a selector expression.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the variable set.
- `selector` (String) A CEL expression to select which release targets this variable set applies to.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the variable set.
- `priority` (Number) The priority of the variable set. Higher priority sets take precedence.
- `variables` (Attributes List) The variables in this variable set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--variables))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the variable set.

<a id="nestedatt--variables"></a>
### Nested Schema for `variables`

Required:

- `key` (String) The key of the variable.

Optional:

- `reference_value` (Attributes) A reference value pointing to a property on the matched resource. Conflicts with `value`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--variables--reference_value))
- `sensitive` (Boolean) Whether the value is sensitive. When true, the value is stored as a sensitive value. Conflicts with `reference_value`.
- `value` (String) The literal value as a string. Numbers, booleans, and JSON objects are also accepted and will be sent with their appropriate types. Conflicts with `reference_value`.

<a id="nestedatt--variables--reference_value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `variables.reference_value`

Required:

- `path` (List of String) The path segments to the value in the referenced resource.
- `reference` (String) The reference key.
